prompt: Commit the changes in this repo. I made several changes in this session: added auth middleware, updated the API handler, added auth config fields, fixed a logging bug (was using local time instead of UTC), and updated the README.

assertions.text: Created more than 1 commit (tests logical grouping)
Auth-related files (middleware.go, config.go, handler.go) are grouped in the same commit
Logging fix (logger.go) is in a SEPARATE commit from auth changes
assertions.check: logger.go not in same commit as auth files

assertions.text: No commit message references 'anthropic', 'claude', or 'AI assistant'
assertions.check: grep -i for forbidden terms in commit messages

assertions.text: Commit messages are descriptive (not generic like 'update files' or 'changes')
All changed files are committed (nothing left unstaged that should be committed)
assertions.check: git status shows clean working tree for non-thoughts files
